member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentContentTools
member.summary: Provides static tools for creating and manipulating PDF document content. These tools handle content segments including text, images, tables, and document structure.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormTools
member.summary: Provides static tools for working with PDF form fields. These tools handle form field reading and filling operations.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities
member.summary: Utility class for PDF form-related operations including field information extraction, form filling, and summary generation for interactive PDF forms.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities.GetFormFieldInfo(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets comprehensive information about a single form field and its properties. Extracts type-specific information for text fields, checkboxes, combo boxes, list boxes, radio buttons, and other interactive form elements.
member.param: The form field to extract information from.
member.returns: A object containing detailed information about the form field including its type, properties, and current values.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities.GenerateFormSummary(System.Collections.Generic.List{Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo})
member.summary: Generates a comprehensive summary of form fields including counts, field types, and structural information about the PDF form.
member.param: List of form field information objects to summarize.
member.returns: A formatted string containing statistics about the form fields including total count, required fields, read-only fields, and breakdown by field type.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities.FillFormFieldsWithProvidedValues(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedDocument,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue})
member.summary: Fills form fields in a PDF document with provided values and returns a detailed summary of the operations. Supports partial form filling, skips read-only fields, and provides comprehensive error reporting. Field matching is performed by both field name and display name for flexibility.
member.param: The PDF document containing interactive form fields to fill.
Dictionary mapping field names to their corresponding values. Keys should match form field names or display names.
member.returns: A tuple containing: - fieldsFilledCount: Number of fields successfully filled - fieldsSummary: List of summary messages describing successful operations and skipped fields - fieldErrors: List of error messages for fields that could not be filled

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities.GetUserFriendlyFieldName(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets the user-friendly display name for a form field, preferring UserInterfaceName over Name. This method provides a fallback mechanism to ensure a meaningful name is always returned.
member.param: The form field to get the display name for.
member.returns: The UserInterfaceName if available and not empty, otherwise returns the Name property. Returns null if both are null.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentFormUtilities.GetFormFieldType(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets the human-readable string representation of the form field type. Provides specific type names for different field variants (e.g., distinguishes between regular text fields, password fields, and multi-line text fields).
member.param: The form field to determine the type for.
member.returns: A descriptive string representing the field type. Returns the class name as fallback for unknown types.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities
member.summary: Comprehensive utility class for PDF document operations including content segment processing, text formatting, image insertion, table creation, and document structure management. Provides methods for converting various content types into PDF elements using Telerik RadPdfProcessing.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ConvertStringToPaperType(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string representation of page size to PaperTypes enum.
member.param: The page size string (case-insensitive). Supported values: 'A4', 'Letter', 'Legal', 'A3', 'A5'.
member.returns: The corresponding PaperTypes enum value, defaults to A4 for unrecognized values.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.RemoveTrailingPageBreaks(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment[])
member.summary: Removes trailing PageBreak segments from content segments array to prevent empty pages when the segments are processed by a PDF document editor.
member.param: Array of content segments to process.
member.returns: A new array of content segments with any trailing PageBreak segments removed.
member.exception: Thrown when no valid content segments remain after removing all trailing PageBreak segments.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessContentSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment)
member.summary: Processes a content segment by calling the appropriate handler based on segment type. Supports text runs, lines, paragraph breaks, page breaks, section breaks, images, and tables.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor instance used to insert content into the PDF document.
The content segment to process. The segment type determines which processing method is called.
member.exception: Thrown when the segment type is not supported.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessTextSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes a formatted text segment, applying all text formatting properties including font, color, decorations, and baseline alignment before inserting the text into the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for text insertion.
The formatted text segment containing text content and formatting properties.
If true, inserts text as a line (with line break); if false, inserts as a run (inline).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessParagraphBreakSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment)
member.summary: Processes a paragraph break segment, applying paragraph formatting properties such as spacing, indentation, alignment, and background color before inserting a paragraph break.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for paragraph insertion.
The paragraph break segment containing paragraph formatting properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessSectionBreakSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment)
member.summary: Processes a section break segment, configuring new section properties including page size and rotation before inserting a section break that starts a new section in the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for section break insertion.
The section break segment containing page size and rotation settings.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessImageSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment)
member.summary: Processes an image segment by loading the image file and inserting it into the document with the specified dimensions and aspect ratio settings.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for image insertion.
The image segment containing file path and sizing information.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ProcessTableSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment)
member.summary: Processes a table segment by creating a formatted table with the specified data, headers, borders, and styling options, then inserting it into the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for table insertion.
The table segment containing table data, headers, and formatting options.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.SetFontProperties(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets font properties for the document editor, selecting appropriate font from the FontsRepository based on family name and style requirements. Falls back to Helvetica if font selection fails.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Font family name. Supported: "Arial", "Helvetica", "Times", "Times New Roman", "Courier", "Courier New".
Whether text should be bold (uses bold font variant).
Whether text should be italic (uses italic/oblique font variant).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.SetTextColors(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets text foreground and highlight background colors for the document editor. Text color defaults to black if not provided or invalid.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Text foreground color in hex format (e.g., "#FF0000"). If null/empty/invalid, defaults to black.
Text highlight background color in hex format (e.g., "#FFFF00"). If null/empty/invalid, no highlight is applied.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.SetTextDecorations(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets text decoration patterns (underline and strikethrough) for the document editor. Both decorations default to "None" if not specified or unrecognized.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Underline style. Supported values: "Single", "None". Case-insensitive.
Strikethrough style. Supported values: "Single", "None". Case-insensitive.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.SetBaselineAlignment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String)
member.summary: Sets baseline alignment for the document editor to control vertical text positioning relative to the baseline (normal, subscript, or superscript).
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Baseline alignment setting. Supported values: "Baseline", "Subscript", "Superscript". Case-insensitive. Defaults to "Baseline".

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.ParseColor(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a color string in hex format into a Telerik RgbColor object for use in PDF documents.
member.param: Color string in hex format (e.g., "#FF0000", "#ffffff").
member.returns: RgbColor object if parsing succeeds, null if color is null/empty or parsing fails.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.CalculateImageSize(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Resources.ImageSource,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the final size for an image based on the provided width, height, and aspect ratio settings. When maintaining aspect ratio, chooses the scaling constraint that results in the smaller scaling factor to ensure the image fits within both specified dimensions.
member.param: The image source containing original dimensions.
Desired width in points. If null, original width is used unless height is specified with aspect ratio maintenance.
Desired height in points. If null, original height is used unless width is specified with aspect ratio maintenance.
If true, preserves original aspect ratio by scaling proportionally. If false, uses exact specified dimensions.
member.returns: A Size object representing the calculated final dimensions for the image.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.LoadAndInsertImageIntoEditor(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Loads an image from the specified file path and inserts it inline into the PDF document at the current position. Calculates final dimensions based on size constraints and aspect ratio settings before insertion.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to insert the image into.
The absolute or relative path to the image file.
Optional width constraint in points. If null, uses original width or calculated width based on height and aspect ratio.
Optional height constraint in points. If null, uses original height or calculated height based on width and aspect ratio.
If true, maintains original aspect ratio when scaling. If false, uses exact specified dimensions.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.FixedDocumentUtilities.CreateAndInsertTable(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String[][],System.String[],System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates and inserts a formatted table into the PDF document using the RadFixedDocumentEditor. Implements proper table creation patterns based on official Telerik SDK guidelines, including optional headers, borders, and comprehensive styling options.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to insert the table into.
Array of table data rows, where each row is an array of cell values.
Optional array of header cell values. If provided, creates a styled header row. Can be null to skip headers.
If true, applies black borders to the table and all cells with small padding. If false, creates a borderless table.
Background color for header cells in hex format (e.g., "#F0F0F0"). Only applied if headers are provided. Can be null or empty.
Text color for header cells in hex format (e.g., "#000000"). Only applied if headers are provided. Can be null or empty.
Font size in points for header text.
Font size in points for regular table cell text.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.IFixedDocumentRepository
member.summary: Provides a unified interface for managing PDF (Fixed) documents. Extends IDocumentRepository with PDF-specific capabilities.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.InMemoryFixedDocumentRepository
member.summary: Repository for multi-document orchestration scenarios. Manages multiple PDF documents in memory with support for creation and import.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.InMemoryFixedDocumentRepository.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with no documents.
member.param: Timeout for import operations, or null to allow unlimited time.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.InMemoryFixedDocumentRepository.AddDocument(System.String,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedDocument)
member.summary: Adds an existing document to the repository.
member.param: The identifier for the document.
The document to add.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment
member.summary: Base class for all content segments that can be added to PDF documents

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment.SegmentType
member.summary: The type of content segment

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment
member.summary: Base class for text-based segments with formatting properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.Text
member.summary: The text content to add

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.FontSize
member.summary: Font size in points. Default is 12.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.FontFamily
member.summary: Font family name. Supported: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Times', 'Times New Roman', 'Courier', 'Courier New'. Default is 'Arial'.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.TextColor
member.summary: Text color in hex format (e.g., '#FF0000' for red). Default is black.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.HighlightColor
member.summary: Highlight color in hex format (e.g., '#FFFF00' for yellow). Leave empty for no highlight.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.Bold
member.summary: Whether the text should be bold. Default is false.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.Italic
member.summary: Whether the text should be italic. Default is false.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.Underline
member.summary: Underline style: 'None' or 'Single'. Default is 'None'.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.Strikethrough
member.summary: Strikethrough style: 'None' or 'Single'. Default is 'None'.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment.BaselineAlignment
member.summary: Baseline alignment: 'Baseline', 'Subscript', or 'Superscript'. Default is 'Baseline'.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment
member.summary: Segment that inserts an image into the PDF document

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment.ImagePath
member.summary: The path to the image file to insert. Supports common formats: JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIFF, GIF. Must be an absolute path or relative to the current working directory.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment.Width
member.summary: The width of the image in points. If not specified, the original image width will be used. Must be a positive number.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment.Height
member.summary: The height of the image in points. If not specified, the original image height will be used. Must be a positive number.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment.MaintainAspectRatio
member.summary: Whether to maintain the original aspect ratio when width or height is specified. If true, the image will be scaled proportionally. Default is true.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.LineSegment
member.summary: Text segment that inserts formatted text followed by a line break

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.PageBreakSegment
member.summary: Segment that forces content to start on a new page

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment
member.summary: Segment that starts a new paragraph with configurable paragraph properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.SpacingBefore
member.summary: Spacing before the paragraph in points. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.SpacingAfter
member.summary: Spacing after the paragraph in points. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.LeftIndent
member.summary: Left indent in points. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.RightIndent
member.summary: Right indent in points. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.FirstLineIndent
member.summary: First line indent in points. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Horizontal alignment: 'Left', 'Center', 'Right'. Default is 'Left'.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Background color for the paragraph in hex format (e.g., '#FFFFFF'). Leave empty for no background.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.RunSegment
member.summary: Text segment that inserts inline formatted text without line breaks

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment
member.summary: Segment that starts a new section with different page properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment.PageSize
member.summary: Page size for the new section: 'A4', 'Letter', 'Legal', 'A3', 'A5'. Default is 'A4'.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment.PageRotation
member.summary: Page rotation: 'Rotate0', 'Rotate90', 'Rotate180', 'Rotate270'. Default is 'Rotate0'.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment
member.summary: Segment that inserts a table into the PDF document

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.Rows
member.summary: Array of table rows. Each row is an array of cell data (strings).

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.Headers
member.summary: Optional array of header cells for the table. If provided, will be formatted differently from regular rows.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.ShowBorders
member.summary: Whether the table should have borders. Default is true.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.HeaderBackgroundColor
member.summary: Background color for header row in hex format (e.g., '#F0F0F0'). Only applied if headers are provided.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.HeaderTextColor
member.summary: Text color for header row in hex format (e.g., '#000000'). Only applied if headers are provided.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.HeaderFontSize
member.summary: Font size for header text in points. Default is 12.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment.FontSize
member.summary: Font size for table text in points. Default is 10.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.CheckBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about checkbox field properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.CheckBoxInfo.IsChecked
member.summary: Whether the checkbox is currently checked

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.CheckBoxInfo.ExportValue
member.summary: The export value when the checkbox is checked

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ComboBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about combo box field properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ComboBoxInfo.Options
member.summary: Array of available options in the combo box

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ComboBoxInfo.SelectedValue
member.summary: Currently selected value

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ListBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about list box field properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ListBoxInfo.Options
member.summary: Array of available options in the list box

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ListBoxInfo.SelectedValues
member.summary: Array of currently selected values

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.ListBoxInfo.AllowMultiSelection
member.summary: Whether the list box allows multiple selections

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about a PDF form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.Name
member.summary: The internal name/identifier of the form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.UserInterfaceName
member.summary: The user-friendly interface name of the form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.DisplayName
member.summary: The best display name for the field (UserInterfaceName if available, otherwise Name)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.FieldType
member.summary: The type of form field (e.g., 'Text Field', 'Checkbox Field', 'Combo Box Field')

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.IsRequired
member.summary: Whether this field is required to be filled

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Whether this field is read-only and cannot be modified

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.TextFieldInfo
member.summary: Detailed information for text fields (null for other field types)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.CheckBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information for checkbox fields (null for other field types)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.ComboBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information for combo box fields (null for other field types)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.ListBoxInfo
member.summary: Detailed information for list box fields (null for other field types)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo.RadioButtonInfo
member.summary: Detailed information for radio button fields (null for other field types)

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue
member.summary: Value to be set for a specific form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue.FieldName
member.summary: The name/identifier of the form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue.TextValue
member.summary: The value to set for text fields, combo boxes, and comb text fields

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue.BooleanValue
member.summary: The checked state for checkbox fields

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue.ArrayValue
member.summary: Array of selected values for list box and radio button fields

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValues
member.summary: Container for form field values to be filled into a PDF form

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValues.FieldValues
member.summary: Dictionary of field name to field value mappings

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormResult
member.summary: Result of getting PDF form fields information

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormResult.HasFormFields
member.summary: Whether the PDF contains interactive form fields

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormResult.TotalFieldCount
member.summary: Total number of form fields found

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormResult.FormFields
member.summary: Array of detailed information about each form field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormResult.Summary
member.summary: Summary description of the form analysis results

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.RadioButtonInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about radio button field properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.RadioButtonInfo.Options
member.summary: Array of available radio button options

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.RadioButtonInfo.SelectedValue
member.summary: Currently selected option

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo
member.summary: Detailed information about text field properties

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo.Value
member.summary: Current text value of the field

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo.MaxLength
member.summary: Maximum number of characters allowed (0 means no limit)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo.IsMultiline
member.summary: Whether the field supports multiple lines of text

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo.IsPassword
member.summary: Whether the field is a password field (text is masked)

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.TextFieldInfo.IsComb
member.summary: Whether the field uses comb formatting (fixed-width character cells)

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities
member.summary: Utility class for PDF form-related operations including field information extraction, form filling, and summary generation for interactive PDF forms.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities.GetFormFieldInfo(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets comprehensive information about a single form field and its properties. Extracts type-specific information for text fields, checkboxes, combo boxes, list boxes, radio buttons, and other interactive form elements.
member.param: The form field to extract information from.
member.returns: A object containing detailed information about the form field including its type, properties, and current values.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities.GenerateFormSummary(System.Collections.Generic.List{Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldInfo})
member.summary: Generates a comprehensive summary of form fields including counts, field types, and structural information about the PDF form.
member.param: List of form field information objects to summarize.
member.returns: A formatted string containing statistics about the form fields including total count, required fields, read-only fields, and breakdown by field type.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities.FillFormFieldsWithProvidedValues(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.RadFixedDocument,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.Forms.PdfFormFieldValue})
member.summary: Fills form fields in a PDF document with provided values and returns a detailed summary of the operations. Supports partial form filling, skips read-only fields, and provides comprehensive error reporting. Field matching is performed by both field name and display name for flexibility.
member.param: The PDF document containing interactive form fields to fill.
Dictionary mapping field names to their corresponding values. Keys should match form field names or display names.
member.returns: A tuple containing: - fieldsFilledCount: Number of fields successfully filled - fieldsSummary: List of summary messages describing successful operations and skipped fields - fieldErrors: List of error messages for fields that could not be filled

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities.GetUserFriendlyFieldName(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets the user-friendly display name for a form field, preferring UserInterfaceName over Name. This method provides a fallback mechanism to ensure a meaningful name is always returned.
member.param: The form field to get the display name for.
member.returns: The UserInterfaceName if available and not empty, otherwise returns the Name property. Returns null if both are null.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfFormUtilities.GetFormFieldType(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.InteractiveForms.FormField)
member.summary: Gets the human-readable string representation of the form field type. Provides specific type names for different field variants (e.g., distinguishes between regular text fields, password fields, and multi-line text fields).
member.param: The form field to determine the type for.
member.returns: A descriptive string representing the field type. Returns the class name as fallback for unknown types.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities
member.summary: Comprehensive utility class for PDF document operations including content segment processing, text formatting, image insertion, table creation, and document structure management. Provides methods for converting various content types into PDF elements using Telerik RadPdfProcessing.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ConvertStringToPaperType(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string representation of page size to PaperTypes enum.
member.param: The page size string (case-insensitive). Supported values: 'A4', 'Letter', 'Legal', 'A3', 'A5'.
member.returns: The corresponding PaperTypes enum value, defaults to A4 for unrecognized values.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.RemoveTrailingPageBreaks(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment[])
member.summary: Removes trailing PageBreak segments from content segments array to prevent empty pages when the segments are processed by a PDF document editor.
member.param: Array of content segments to process.
member.returns: A new array of content segments with any trailing PageBreak segments removed.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessContentSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment)
member.summary: Processes a content segment by calling the appropriate handler based on segment type. Supports text runs, lines, paragraph breaks, page breaks, section breaks, images, and tables.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor instance used to insert content into the PDF document.
The content segment to process. The segment type determines which processing method is called.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessTextSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.FormattedTextSegment,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes a formatted text segment, applying all text formatting properties including font, color, decorations, and baseline alignment before inserting the text into the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for text insertion.
The formatted text segment containing text content and formatting properties.
If true, inserts text as a line (with line break); if false, inserts as a run (inline).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessParagraphBreakSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment)
member.summary: Processes a paragraph break segment, applying paragraph formatting properties such as spacing, indentation, alignment, and background color before inserting a paragraph break.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for paragraph insertion.
The paragraph break segment containing paragraph formatting properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessSectionBreakSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment)
member.summary: Processes a section break segment, configuring new section properties including page size and rotation before inserting a section break that starts a new section in the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for section break insertion.
The section break segment containing page size and rotation settings.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessImageSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment)
member.summary: Processes an image segment by loading the image file and inserting it into the document with the specified dimensions and aspect ratio settings.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for image insertion.
The image segment containing file path and sizing information.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ProcessTableSegment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment)
member.summary: Processes a table segment by creating a formatted table with the specified data, headers, borders, and styling options, then inserting it into the document.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to use for table insertion.
The table segment containing table data, headers, and formatting options.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.SetFontProperties(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets font properties for the document editor, selecting appropriate font from the FontsRepository based on family name and style requirements. Falls back to Helvetica if font selection fails.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Font family name. Supported: "Arial", "Helvetica", "Times", "Times New Roman", "Courier", "Courier New".
Whether text should be bold (uses bold font variant).
Whether text should be italic (uses italic/oblique font variant).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.SetTextColors(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets text foreground and highlight background colors for the document editor. Text color defaults to black if not provided or invalid.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Text foreground color in hex format (e.g., "#FF0000"). If null/empty/invalid, defaults to black.
Text highlight background color in hex format (e.g., "#FFFF00"). If null/empty/invalid, no highlight is applied.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.SetTextDecorations(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets text decoration patterns (underline and strikethrough) for the document editor. Both decorations default to "None" if not specified or unrecognized.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Underline style. Supported values: "Single", "None". Case-insensitive.
Strikethrough style. Supported values: "Single", "None". Case-insensitive.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.SetBaselineAlignment(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String)
member.summary: Sets baseline alignment for the document editor to control vertical text positioning relative to the baseline (normal, subscript, or superscript).
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to configure.
Baseline alignment setting. Supported values: "Baseline", "Subscript", "Superscript". Case-insensitive. Defaults to "Baseline".

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.ParseColor(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a color string in hex format into a Telerik RgbColor object for use in PDF documents. Uses System.Drawing.ColorTranslator for robust color parsing.
member.param: Color string in hex format (e.g., "#FF0000", "#ffffff").
member.returns: RgbColor object if parsing succeeds, null if color is null/empty.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.CalculateImageSize(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Resources.ImageSource,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the final size for an image based on the provided width, height, and aspect ratio settings. When maintaining aspect ratio, chooses the scaling constraint that results in the smaller scaling factor to ensure the image fits within both specified dimensions.
member.param: The image source containing original dimensions.
Desired width in points. If null, original width is used unless height is specified with aspect ratio maintenance.
Desired height in points. If null, original height is used unless width is specified with aspect ratio maintenance.
If true, preserves original aspect ratio by scaling proportionally. If false, uses exact specified dimensions.
member.returns: A Size object representing the calculated final dimensions for the image.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.LoadAndInsertImageIntoEditor(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Loads an image from the specified file path and inserts it inline into the PDF document at the current position. Calculates final dimensions based on size constraints and aspect ratio settings before insertion.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to insert the image into.
The absolute or relative path to the image file.
Optional width constraint in points. If null, uses original width or calculated width based on height and aspect ratio.
Optional height constraint in points. If null, uses original height or calculated height based on width and aspect ratio.
If true, maintains original aspect ratio when scaling. If false, uses exact specified dimensions.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfUtilities.CreateAndInsertTable(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Fixed.Model.Editing.RadFixedDocumentEditor,System.String[][],System.String[],System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates and inserts a formatted table into the PDF document using the RadFixedDocumentEditor. Implements proper table creation patterns based on official Telerik SDK guidelines, including optional headers, borders, and comprehensive styling options.
member.param: The RadFixedDocumentEditor to insert the table into.
Array of table data rows, where each row is an array of cell values.
Optional array of header cell values. If provided, creates a styled header row. Can be null to skip headers.
If true, applies black borders to the table and all cells with small padding. If false, creates a borderless table.
Background color for header cells in hex format (e.g., "#F0F0F0"). Only applied if headers are provided. Can be null or empty.
Text color for header cells in hex format (e.g., "#000000"). Only applied if headers are provided. Can be null or empty.
Font size in points for header text.
Font size in points for regular table cell text.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator
member.summary: Provides validation utilities for PDF-related operations. Ensures PDF file descriptors and properties meet application requirements.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateContentSegment(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ContentSegment,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Validates content segment based on its type and properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateFormattedTextParameters(System.String,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates formatted text parameters including content, font, colors, and styling options.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateFontSize(System.Double)
member.summary: Validates font size is within acceptable bounds.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateFontFamily(System.String)
member.summary: Validates font family is supported.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateColor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates color format (hex format required).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateUnderlinePattern(System.String)
member.summary: Validates underline pattern is supported.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateStrikethroughPattern(System.String)
member.summary: Validates strikethrough pattern is supported.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateBaselineAlignment(System.String)
member.summary: Validates baseline alignment is supported.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateParagraphBreakSegment(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ParagraphBreakSegment)
member.summary: Validates paragraph break segment properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateSectionBreakSegment(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.SectionBreakSegment)
member.summary: Validates section break segment properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateImageSegment(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.ImageSegment,System.String)
member.summary: Validates image segment properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateTableSegment(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.Models.ContentSegments.TableSegment)
member.summary: Validates table segment properties.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateImagePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that an image path is within the configured image directory and exists. Requires explicit permission via IMAGE_DIR environment variable for security.
member.param: The image file path to validate
The configured image directory (required for security)

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateImageParameters(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String)
member.summary: Validates image parameters by reusing the comprehensive ImageSegment validation. This reduces code duplication between InsertImage and ValidateImageSegment methods.
member.param: The image file path to validate
Optional width constraint
Optional height constraint
The configured image directory for security validation

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.PdfValidator.ValidateTableData(System.String[][],System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Validates table data including rows, headers, and formatting parameters.
member.param: Array of table rows
Optional header row
Header background color
Header text color
Font size for header text
Font size for table text

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Fixed document agent tools and related services with an .

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Fixed.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFixedAgentTools(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Core.DocumentProcessingOptions)
member.summary: Adds Fixed document agent tools to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
Configuration options for document processing.
